title: Gas Engine Market to Reach US$9.51 Billion by 2034, with Industrial Expansion and Urbanization: New Industry Research by The Insight Partners
author: The Insight Partners
description: The global gas engine market is projected to grow from US$5.84 billion in 2025 to US$9.51 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 5.6%. Growth is driven by increased natural gas availability, stricter emission regulations, urbanization, and government support for clean energy transitions. Natural gas engines are being adopted across power generation, industrial, and commercial sectors as a cleaner alternative to diesel, with Asia Pacific showing strong growth potential.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: GE is highlighted as a key player with enhanced Jenbacher type 9 gas engine achieving 50.1% electrical efficiency, demonstrating technological advancement and market leadership in high-performance gas engines.

Cummins is highlighted for launching the industry's first natural gas variable-speed, large-displacement engine (HSK78G) with Liberty Energy, demonstrating innovation in efficient fuel engine development.
Caterpillar is mentioned as a major player with the 1 MW CG132B-16 natural gas generator offering high power density and optimized performance for CHP applications, capturing growing market demand.

Mitsubishi is recognized as a major player and specifically highlighted for launching the SGP M450 hydrogen co-firing system in July 2025, positioning the company at the forefront of clean energy transition technology.
Wartsila is listed among major gas engine companies positioned to benefit from the growing market driven by urbanization, industrial expansion, and the shift toward cleaner energy solutions.

title: Incinerator Market Size to Hit USD 22.70 Billion by 2035 | Research by SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global incinerator market is expected to grow from USD 16.23 billion in 2025 to USD 22.70 billion by 2035 at a CAGR of 3.46%, driven by rising municipal waste volumes, stricter environmental regulations, and increased adoption of energy recovery technologies. The U.S. market specifically is projected to expand from USD 3.40 billion to USD 4.60 billion over the same period. Key growth segments include biomedical waste treatment and heat recovery systems, with Asia Pacific leading regional market share at 39%.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a leading market player in the growing incinerator market with projected 3.46% CAGR through 2035, benefiting from increased demand for waste management solutions and energy recovery technologies.

title: Carbon Capture Materials Market worth $99,098.5 million by 2030 at 8.2%, says MarketsandMarkets™
author: Marketsandmarkets
description: The Carbon Capture Materials Market is expected to expand from $66.9 billion in 2025 to $99.1 billion by 2030, driven by decarbonization needs in hard-to-abate industries like cement, steel, and chemicals, with membranes emerging as the dominant capture technology.

title: Sapphire Technologies Secures $18 Million Series C to Accelerate Growth, Including Investment from Mitsubishi Heavy Industries
author: Freddie Sarhan
description: Sapphire Technologies raised $18 million in Series C funding, with investment from Mitsubishi Heavy Industries and existing investors. The funding will expand their California manufacturing facility and support turboexpander technology deployment in Japan.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Investing in innovative clean energy technology with potential for global impact

title: サファイア・テクノロジーズ (Sapphire Technologies)、成長加速のため、三菱重工業 (Mitsubishi Heavy Industries) からの出資を含む1,800万ドル (約26億6,652万円) のシリーズC資金調達を完了
author: Freddie Sarhan
description: Sapphire Technologies secured $18 million in Series C funding from Mitsubishi Heavy Industries and existing investors to expand its California manufacturing facility and develop new turboexpander projects for converting pressure energy into clean electricity.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Investing in innovative clean energy technology that supports carbon reduction and energy transition goals
